decision: Reject a mutable action ref or lock/workflow mismatch; update the reviewed full SHA, provenance, approved locations, tests, verification, and rollback atomically.
evidenceRequired: Public upstream ref-to-commit observation, reviewed release and diff, exact 40-character pin, approved workflow locations, update owner, and repository verification.
A preserved previous pin and source receipt for rollback.
limitations: Public Git refs establish identity at observation time only, not source safety, OIDC behavior, credential scope, or hosted execution.
nonClaims: A full SHA is necessary source control but does not prove safe or successful action behavior.
rollbackRevocation: Restore the previous reviewed pin and matching lock entry across every approved workflow, then rerun the same policy and repository verification.
